translationUnit:
translationUnit
         ::= translationUnitItem+ EOF
 no referencestranslationUnitItem:
translationUnitItem
         ::= externalDeclaration
           | PreprocessingDirective
           | Comment
 referenced by: declarationSeq translationUnit externalDeclaration:
externalDeclaration
         ::= declaration
           | usingDeclaration
           | usingDirective
           | asmDefinition
           | namespaceAliasDefinition
           | templateDeclaration
           | explicitInstantiation
           | explicitSpecialization
           | linkageSpecification
           | namespaceDefinition
 referenced by: translationUnitItem functionDefinition:
functionDefinition
         ::= declarationSpecifiers? declarator ( ctorInitializer? functionBody | functionTryBlock )
 no referencesfunctionBody:
functionBody
         ::= compoundStatement
 referenced by: declaration functionDefinition functionTryBlock memberDeclaration functionTryBlock:
functionTryBlock
         ::= 'try' ctorInitializer? functionBody handlerSeq
 referenced by: declaration functionDefinition ctorInitializer:
ctorInitializer
         ::= ':' memInitializerList
 referenced by: declaration functionDefinition functionTryBlock memberDeclaration memInitializerList:
memInitializerList
         ::= memInitializer ( ',' memInitializer )*
 referenced by: ctorInitializer memInitializer:
memInitializer
         ::= memInitializerId '(' expressionList? ')'
 referenced by: memInitializerList memInitializerId:
memInitializerId
         ::= '::'? nestedNameSpecifier? className
           | Identifier
 referenced by: memInitializer declaration:
declaration
         ::= declarationSpecifiers ( initDeclaratorList? ';' | declarator ( ctorInitializer? functionBody | functionTryBlock ) )
 referenced by: blockItem declarationList explicitInstantiation explicitSpecialization externalDeclaration linkageSpecification memberDeclaration templateDeclaration declarationList:
declarationList
         ::= declaration+
 no referencesdeclarationSpecifiers:
declarationSpecifiers
         ::= declarationNoTypeQualifier+
           | declarationQualifier* declarationTypeSpecifier declarationQualifier*
 referenced by: declaration functionDefinition memberDeclaration parameterDeclaration simpleDeclaration declarationNoTypeQualifier:
declarationNoTypeQualifier
         ::= functionSpecifier
 referenced by: declarationSpecifiers declarationQualifier:
declarationQualifier
         ::= storageClassSpecifier
           | functionSpecifier
           | 'friend'
           | 'typedef'
           | cvQualifier
 referenced by: declarationSpecifiers declarationTypeSpecifier:
declarationTypeSpecifier
         ::= builtinSimpleTypeSpecifier+
           | userSimpleTypeSpecifier
           | classSpecifier
           | enumSpecifier
           | elaboratedTypeSpecifier
 referenced by: declarationSpecifiers declSpecifier:
declSpecifier
         ::= storageClassSpecifier
           | typeSpecifier
           | functionSpecifier
           | 'friend'
           | 'typedef'
 no referencesstorageClassSpecifier:
storageClassSpecifier
         ::= 'auto'
           | 'register'
           | 'static'
           | 'extern'
           | 'mutable'
 referenced by: declSpecifier declarationQualifier functionSpecifier:
functionSpecifier
         ::= 'inline'
           | 'virtual'
           | 'explicit'
 referenced by: declSpecifier declarationNoTypeQualifier declarationQualifier typeSpecifier:
typeSpecifier
         ::= simpleTypeSpecifier
           | classSpecifier
           | enumSpecifier
           | elaboratedTypeSpecifier
           | cvQualifier
 referenced by: declSpecifier typeSpecifierSeq simpleTypeSpecifier:
simpleTypeSpecifier
         ::= qualifiedTemplateType
           | '::'? ( nestedNameSpecifier? ( Identifier '<' templateArgumentList? '>' | typeName ) | nestedNameSpecifier 'template'? templateId )
           | 'char'
           | 'wchar_t'
           | 'bool'
           | 'short'
           | 'int'
           | 'long'
           | 'signed'
           | 'unsigned'
           | 'float'
           | 'double'
           | 'void'
 referenced by: typeSpecifier builtinSimpleTypeSpecifier:
builtinSimpleTypeSpecifier
         ::= 'char'
           | 'wchar_t'
           | 'bool'
           | 'short'
           | 'int'
           | 'long'
           | 'signed'
           | 'unsigned'
           | 'float'
           | 'double'
           | 'void'
 referenced by: declarationTypeSpecifier userSimpleTypeSpecifier:
userSimpleTypeSpecifier
         ::= qualifiedTemplateType
           | '::'? ( nestedNameSpecifier? ( Identifier '<' templateArgumentList? '>' | typeName ) | nestedNameSpecifier 'template'? templateId )
 referenced by: declarationTypeSpecifier qualifiedTemplateType:
qualifiedTemplateType
         ::= '::'? nestedNameSpecifier? Identifier '<' templateArgumentList? '>' qualifiedTypeTail+
 referenced by: simpleTypeSpecifier userSimpleTypeSpecifier qualifiedTypeTail:
qualifiedTypeTail
         ::= '::' Identifier
 referenced by: qualifiedTemplateType typeName:
typeName ::= className
           | enumName
           | typedefName
 referenced by: pseudoDestructorName simpleTypeSpecifier userSimpleTypeSpecifier className:
className
         ::= Identifier
           | templateId
 referenced by: baseSpecifier classOrNamespaceName memInitializerId typeName unqualifiedId enumName:
enumName ::= Identifier
 referenced by: typeName typedefName:
typedefName
         ::= Identifier
 referenced by: typeName elaboratedTypeSpecifier:
elaboratedTypeSpecifier
         ::= ( classKey | 'enum' ) '::'? nestedNameSpecifier? Identifier
           | 'typename' '::'? nestedNameSpecifier ( Identifier | 'template'? templateId )
 referenced by: declarationTypeSpecifier typeSpecifier classKey:
classKey ::= 'class'
           | 'struct'
           | 'union'
 referenced by: classHead elaboratedTypeSpecifier cvQualifier:
cvQualifier
         ::= 'const'
           | 'volatile'
 referenced by: cvQualifierSeq declarationQualifier typeQualifier typeSpecifier classSpecifier:
classSpecifier
         ::= classHead '{' memberSpecification? '}'
 referenced by: declarationTypeSpecifier typeSpecifier classHead:
classHead
         ::= classKey ( nestedNameSpecifier? ( Identifier | templateId ) )? baseClause?
 referenced by: classSpecifier baseClause:
baseClause
         ::= ':' baseSpecifierList
 referenced by: classHead baseSpecifierList:
baseSpecifierList
         ::= baseSpecifier ( ',' baseSpecifier )*
 referenced by: baseClause baseSpecifier:
baseSpecifier
         ::= ( 'virtual' accessSpecifier? | accessSpecifier 'virtual'? )? '::'? nestedNameSpecifier? className
 referenced by: baseSpecifierList accessSpecifier:
accessSpecifier
         ::= 'private'
           | 'protected'
           | 'public'
 referenced by: baseSpecifier memberSpecificationItem memberSpecification:
memberSpecification
         ::= memberSpecificationItem+
 referenced by: classSpecifier memberSpecificationItem:
memberSpecificationItem
         ::= memberDeclaration
           | Comment
           | accessSpecifier ':'
 referenced by: memberSpecification memberDeclaration:
memberDeclaration
         ::= declarator ctorInitializer? functionBody ';'?
           | declaration
           | ( declarationSpecifiers? memberDeclaratorList? | '::'? nestedNameSpecifier 'template'? unqualifiedId ) ';'
           | usingDeclaration
           | templateDeclaration
 referenced by: memberSpecificationItem memberDeclaratorList:
memberDeclaratorList
         ::= memberDeclarator ( ',' memberDeclarator )*
 referenced by: memberDeclaration memberDeclarator:
memberDeclarator
         ::= declarator ( pureSpecifier | constantInitializer )?
           | Identifier? ':' constantExpression
 referenced by: memberDeclaratorList pureSpecifier:
pureSpecifier
         ::= '=' IntegerConstant
 referenced by: memberDeclarator constantInitializer:
constantInitializer
         ::= '=' constantExpression
 referenced by: memberDeclarator enumSpecifier:
enumSpecifier
         ::= 'enum' ( Identifier? '{' enumeratorList '}' | Identifier )
 referenced by: declarationTypeSpecifier typeSpecifier enumeratorList:
enumeratorList
         ::= enumeratorDefinition ( ',' enumeratorDefinition )*
 referenced by: enumSpecifier enumeratorDefinition:
enumeratorDefinition
         ::= enumerator ( '=' constantExpression )?
 referenced by: enumeratorList enumerator:
enumerator
         ::= Identifier
 referenced by: enumeratorDefinition namespaceDefinition:
namespaceDefinition
         ::= namedNamespaceDefinition
           | unnamedNamespaceDefinition
 referenced by: externalDeclaration namedNamespaceDefinition:
namedNamespaceDefinition
         ::= originalNamespaceDefinition
           | extensionNamespaceDefinition
 referenced by: namespaceDefinition originalNamespaceDefinition:
originalNamespaceDefinition
         ::= 'namespace' Identifier '{' namespaceBody '}'
 referenced by: namedNamespaceDefinition extensionNamespaceDefinition:
extensionNamespaceDefinition
         ::= 'namespace' originalNamespaceName '{' namespaceBody '}'
 referenced by: namedNamespaceDefinition unnamedNamespaceDefinition:
unnamedNamespaceDefinition
         ::= 'namespace' '{' namespaceBody '}'
 referenced by: namespaceDefinition namespaceBody:
namespaceBody
         ::= declarationSeq?
 referenced by: extensionNamespaceDefinition originalNamespaceDefinition unnamedNamespaceDefinition namespaceName:
namespaceName
         ::= originalNamespaceName
           | namespaceAlias
 referenced by: classOrNamespaceName qualifiedNamespaceSpecifier usingDirective originalNamespaceName:
originalNamespaceName
         ::= Identifier
 referenced by: extensionNamespaceDefinition namespaceName namespaceAlias:
namespaceAlias
         ::= Identifier
 referenced by: namespaceName namespaceAliasDefinition:
namespaceAliasDefinition
         ::= 'namespace' Identifier '=' qualifiedNamespaceSpecifier ';'
 referenced by: blockDeclaration externalDeclaration qualifiedNamespaceSpecifier:
qualifiedNamespaceSpecifier
         ::= '::'? nestedNameSpecifier? namespaceName
 referenced by: namespaceAliasDefinition usingDeclaration:
usingDeclaration
         ::= 'using' ( 'typename'? '::'? nestedNameSpecifier | '::' ) unqualifiedId ';'
 referenced by: blockDeclaration externalDeclaration memberDeclaration usingDirective:
usingDirective
         ::= 'using' 'namespace' '::'? nestedNameSpecifier? namespaceName ';'
 referenced by: blockDeclaration externalDeclaration linkageSpecification:
linkageSpecification
         ::= 'extern' StringLiteral ( '{' declarationSeq? '}' | declaration )
 referenced by: externalDeclaration asmDefinition:
asmDefinition
         ::= 'asm' '(' StringLiteral ')' ';'
 referenced by: blockDeclaration externalDeclaration initDeclaratorList:
initDeclaratorList
         ::= initDeclarator ( ',' initDeclarator )*
 referenced by: declaration simpleDeclaration initDeclarator:
initDeclarator
         ::= declarator initializer?
 referenced by: initDeclaratorList declarator:
declarator
         ::= ptrOperator* ( '*' typeQualifierList? )* directDeclarator
 referenced by: declaration directDeclaratorCore exceptionDeclaration functionDefinition initDeclarator memberDeclaration memberDeclarator parameterDeclaration directDeclarator:
directDeclarator
         ::= directDeclaratorCore directDeclaratorSuffix*
 referenced by: declarator directDeclaratorCore:
directDeclaratorCore
         ::= declaratorId
           | '(' declarator ')'
 referenced by: directDeclarator directDeclaratorSuffix:
directDeclaratorSuffix
         ::= '(' parameterDeclarationClause ')' cvQualifierSeq? exceptionSpecification?
           | '[' constantExpression? ']'
 referenced by: directDeclarator declaratorId:
declaratorId
         ::= idExpression
 referenced by: directDeclaratorCore ptrOperator:
ptrOperator
         ::= ( '::'? nestedNameSpecifier )? '*' cvQualifierSeq?
           | '&'
 referenced by: abstractDeclarator conversionTypeId declarator newTypeId cvQualifierSeq:
cvQualifierSeq
         ::= cvQualifier+
 referenced by: directAbstractDeclaratorCore directAbstractDeclaratorSuffix directDeclaratorSuffix ptrOperator nestedNameSpecifier:
nestedNameSpecifier
         ::= nestedNameElement+
 referenced by: baseSpecifier classHead elaboratedTypeSpecifier memInitializerId memberDeclaration pseudoDestructorName ptrOperator qualifiedId qualifiedNamespaceSpecifier qualifiedTemplateType simpleTypeSpecifier userSimpleTypeSpecifier usingDeclaration usingDirective nestedNameElement:
nestedNameElement
         ::= classOrNamespaceName '::' 'template'?
 referenced by: nestedNameSpecifier classOrNamespaceName:
classOrNamespaceName
         ::= className
           | namespaceName
 referenced by: nestedNameElement idExpression:
idExpression
         ::= unqualifiedId
           | qualifiedId
 referenced by: declaratorId postfixSuffix primaryExpression templateArgument typeParameter unqualifiedId:
unqualifiedId

           | operatorFunctionId
           | conversionFunctionId
           | '~' className
           | templateId
 referenced by: idExpression memberDeclaration qualifiedId usingDeclaration qualifiedId:
qualifiedId
         ::= '::'? nestedNameSpecifier 'template'? unqualifiedId
           | '::' ( Identifier | operatorFunctionId | templateId )
 referenced by: idExpression operatorFunctionId:
operatorFunctionId
         ::= 'operator' Operator
 referenced by: qualifiedId unqualifiedId conversionFunctionId:
conversionFunctionId
         ::= 'operator' conversionTypeId

         ::= typeSpecifierSeq ptrOperator*

typeSpecifierSeq
         ::= typeSpecifier+
 referenced by: conversionTypeId exceptionDeclaration newTypeId typeId parameterDeclarationClause:
parameterDeclarationClause
         ::= parameterDeclarationClauseBody?
 referenced by: directAbstractDeclaratorCore directAbstractDeclaratorSuffix directDeclaratorSuffix parameterDeclarationClauseBody:
parameterDeclarationClauseBody
         ::= parameterDeclarationList ( ',' '...' )?
           | '...'
 referenced by: parameterDeclarationClause parameterDeclarationList:
parameterDeclarationList
         ::= parameterDeclaration ( ',' parameterDeclaration )*
 referenced by: parameterDeclarationClauseBody parameterDeclaration:

         ::= declarationSpecifiers ( abstractDeclarator | declarator )? ( '=' assignmentExpression )?

exceptionSpecification
         ::= 'throw' '(' typeIdList? ')'

         ::= typeId ( ',' typeId )*

typeId   ::= typeSpecifierSeq abstractDeclarator?

         ::= ptrOperator* ( ptrOperator | directAbstractDeclarator )

directAbstractDeclarator

 referenced by: abstractDeclarator directAbstractDeclaratorCore:
directAbstractDeclaratorCore
         ::= '(' ( abstractDeclarator ')' | parameterDeclarationClause ')' cvQualifierSeq? exceptionSpecification? )
           | '[' constantExpression? ']'
 referenced by: directAbstractDeclarator directAbstractDeclaratorSuffix:
directAbstractDeclaratorSuffix
         ::= '(' parameterDeclarationClause ')' cvQualifierSeq? exceptionSpecification?
           | '[' constantExpression? ']'
 referenced by: directAbstractDeclarator typeQualifierList:
typeQualifierList
         ::= typeQualifier+

         ::= cvQualifier

templateDeclaration

 referenced by: externalDeclaration memberDeclaration templateParameterList:
templateParameterList
         ::= templateParameter ( ',' templateParameter )*
 referenced by: templateDeclaration typeParameter templateParameter:
templateParameter
         ::= typeParameter
           | parameterDeclaration
 referenced by: templateParameterList typeParameter:
typeParameter
         ::= ( 'class' | 'typename' ) Identifier? ( '=' typeId )?
           | 'template' '<' templateParameterList '>' 'class' Identifier? ( '=' idExpression )?

templateId
         ::= templateName '<' templateArgumentList? '>'
 referenced by: classHead className elaboratedTypeSpecifier pseudoDestructorName qualifiedId simpleTypeSpecifier unqualifiedId userSimpleTypeSpecifier templateName:
templateName
         ::= Identifier
 referenced by: templateId templateArgumentList:
templateArgumentList
         ::= templateArgument ( ',' templateArgument )*
 referenced by: qualifiedTemplateType simpleTypeSpecifier templateId userSimpleTypeSpecifier templateArgument:
templateArgument

explicitInstantiation
         ::= 'template' declaration
 referenced by: externalDeclaration explicitSpecialization:
explicitSpecialization
         ::= 'template' '<' '>' declaration
 referenced by: externalDeclaration initializer:
initializer
         ::= '=' initializerClause
           | '(' expressionList ')'
 referenced by: initDeclarator initializerClause:
initializerClause
         ::= assignmentExpression
           | '{' ( initializerList? ','? )? '}'
 referenced by: initializer initializerList initializerList:
initializerList
         ::= initializerClause ( ',' initializerClause )*
 referenced by: initializerClause statement:
statement
         ::= labeledStatement
           | expressionStatement
           | compoundStatement
           | selectionStatement
           | iterationStatement
           | jumpStatement
           | declarationStatement
           | tryBlock
           | Comment
 referenced by: blockItem iterationStatement labeledStatement selectionStatement labeledStatement:
labeledStatement
         ::= ( Identifier | 'case' constantExpression | 'default' ) ':' statement
 referenced by: statement expressionStatement:
expressionStatement
         ::= expression? ';'
 referenced by: forInitStatement statement compoundStatement:
compoundStatement
         ::= '{' blockItem* '}'
 referenced by: functionBody handler statement tryBlock blockItem:
blockItem
         ::= statement
           | declaration
 referenced by: compoundStatement declarationStatement:
declarationStatement
         ::= blockDeclaration
 referenced by: statement simpleDeclaration:
simpleDeclaration
         ::= declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? ';'
 referenced by: blockDeclaration forInitStatement blockDeclaration:
blockDeclaration
         ::= simpleDeclaration
           | asmDefinition
           | namespaceAliasDefinition
           | usingDeclaration
           | usingDirective
 referenced by: declarationStatement selectionStatement:
selectionStatement
         ::= ( 'if' '(' condition ')' ( statement 'else' )? | 'switch' '(' condition ')' ) statement
 referenced by: statement condition:
condition
         ::= expression
 referenced by: iterationStatement selectionStatement iterationStatement:
iterationStatement
         ::= ( 'while' '(' condition | 'for' '(' forInitStatement condition? ';' expression? ) ')' statement
           | 'do' statement 'while' '(' expression ')' ';'
 referenced by: statement forInitStatement:
forInitStatement
         ::= simpleDeclaration
           | expressionStatement
 referenced by: iterationStatement jumpStatement:
jumpStatement

 referenced by: statement tryBlock:
tryBlock ::= 'try' compoundStatement handlerSeq
 referenced by: statement handlerSeq:
handlerSeq
         ::= handler+

handler  ::= 'catch' '(' exceptionDeclaration ')' compoundStatement

exceptionDeclaration

throwExpression

 referenced by: assignmentExpression expression:
expression
         ::= assignmentExpression ( ',' assignmentExpression )*

assignmentExpression

assignmentOperator

           | '*='
           | '/='
           | '%='
           | '+='
           | '-='
           | '<<='

           | '&='

conditionalExpression

constantExpression

inclusiveOrExpression

andExpression

equalityExpression

relationalExpression

shiftExpression

additiveExpression

multiplicativeExpression

pmExpression

castExpression

unaryOperator

postfixSuffix

Identifier
         ::= IdentifierName - ( Keyword | ConstantKeyword )

IdentifierName

IdentifierStart
         ::= [A-Z_a-z#xC0-#xD6#xD8-#xF6#xF8-#x2FF#x370-#x37D#x37F-#x1FFF#x200C-#x200D#x2070-#x218F#x2C00-#x2FEF#x3001-#xD7FF#xF900-#xFDCF#xFDF0-#xFFFD#x10000-#xEFFFF]

IdentifierPart

           | [0-9#xB7#x0300-#x036F#x203F-#x2040]
 referenced by: IdentifierName Keyword:
Keyword  ::= 'auto'
           | 'asm'
           | 'break'
           | 'bool'
           | 'case'
           | 'catch'
           | 'char'

           | 'float'
           | 'for'

           | 'goto'

           | 'inline'

ConstantKeyword

Operator ::= 'new'
